title: PROTEIN INJECTION PROTOCOL
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"31ld0","text":"This protocol details the injection parameters of the protein.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Intracortical/Intrastriatal (IC/IS): 2.0 mm lateral from the midline, +0.2 mm relative to bregma, and 0.8 and 2.6 mm deep from the dura.
Brainstem: 0.2 mm lateral from the midline, -7.34 mm from bregma, 3.75 mm deep from the dura.
2.5 µg of total protein in a volume of 2.5 µL .
Needle: 28 ga needle attached via tubing to a Hamilton syringe controlled by a constant pressure syringe pump (Harvard Apparatus, Holliston, MA).
creator: Jane Balster
